cause_analysis.narrative: Beauty 911 Skin Lounge churned on 2026-02-02 after 172 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-24 via app_chat — 40 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. Median Zoca response time was 3.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 40 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
